hypothesis: If 3D molecule generation models are retrained on Kekulized, chemically accurate valency data rather than the original valency data, then the generated molecules will exhibit smaller geometric deviations (Δr, Δθ, Δφ) and lower relaxation energy (ΔE_relax) after GFN2-xTB optimization, indicating improved geometric plausibility compared with models trained on the original data.
